docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT FANNING, CHARLES ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT FANNING, CHARLES
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT FANNING, CHARLES
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMAN B. SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-14-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-06-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01
JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK; BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR SETT. CONF, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD; JUDGMENT SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FANNING, CHARLES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 411 O'FARRELL ST, #416, STAYED UNTIL MAR-01-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT NO EVICTION BEFORE 3/1/95, 9AM; PLTF. WILL WAIVE BACK RENTS AND DAMAGES IF DEFT. VACATES BY ABOVE DATE; IF DEFT. DOES NOT, PLTF. WILL HAVE A JUDGMENT FOR $796.76 FOR RENTS AND DAMAGES; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FANNING, CHARLES
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $9.17 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMAN B.
